meta.topic: Clostridioides difficile infection control and treatment

questions.topic: Clostridioides difficile infection control and treatment

stem.en: An older adult develops acute watery diarrhea, fever, leukocytosis, dehydration, and abdominal distension after broad-spectrum antibiotic therapy. Use the exhibits to answer the unfolding questions.
stem.zh: 一名老年患者在接受广谱抗生素治疗后出现急性水样腹泻、发热、白细胞增多、脱水和腹胀。请根据病例资料回答展开式问题。

title.en: Clostridioides difficile colitis after broad-spectrum antibiotics
title.zh: 广谱抗生素治疗后的艰难梭菌结肠炎

summary.en: Mrs. Dolores Fuentes is a 74-year-old hospitalized client recovering from influenza A complicated by hospital-acquired Pseudomonas pneumonia. She recently completed piperacillin-tazobactam and levofloxacin, takes chronic prednisone and methotrexate for rheumatoid arthritis, and uses a proton pump inhibitor. On hospital day 14, she develops frequent watery foul-smelling stools with fever, leukocytosis, hypokalemia, mild acute kidney injury, dehydration, and abdominal distension.
summary.zh: Dolores Fuentes 女士，74 岁，因甲型流感并发医院获得性铜绿假单胞菌肺炎住院恢复中。她近期完成哌拉西林-他唑巴坦和左氧氟沙星治疗，因类风湿关节炎长期使用泼尼松和甲氨蝶呤，并使用质子泵抑制剂。住院第 14 天，她出现频繁水样恶臭便、发热、白细胞增多、低钾血症、轻度急性肾损伤、脱水和腹胀。

content.en: Hospital day 14. Age 74. Recent hospital-acquired pneumonia caused by Pseudomonas aeruginosa treated with piperacillin-tazobactam for 10 days and IV levofloxacin for 7 days; antibiotics completed within the past week. Rheumatoid arthritis is managed with methotrexate 15 mg weekly and prednisone 7.5 mg daily for 3 years. Home omeprazole was continued after IV pantoprazole during the acute pneumonia phase. Baseline mild CKD: creatinine 1.1 mg/dL, eGFR 54 mL/min. No drug allergies. Previously independent, now deconditioned and using a rolling walker with standby assistance.
content.zh: 住院第 14 天。年龄 74 岁。近期因铜绿假单胞菌所致医院获得性肺炎接受哌拉西林-他唑巴坦 10 天和静脉左氧氟沙星 7 天治疗；抗生素在过去一周内完成。类风湿关节炎用甲氨蝶呤每周 15 mg 和泼尼松每日 7.5 mg 治疗，已持续 3 年。急性肺炎期曾用静脉泮托拉唑，之后恢复家庭用药奥美拉唑。基础轻度慢性肾病：肌酐 1.1 mg/dL，eGFR 54 mL/min。无药物过敏史。入院前独立活动，目前体力下降，需使用助行器并有人在旁保护。

content.en: Hospital day 14. Age 74. Recent hospital-acquired pneumonia caused by Pseudomonas aeruginosa treated with piperacillin-tazobactam for 10 days and IV levofloxacin for 7 days; antibiotics completed within the past week. Rheumatoid arthritis is managed with methotrexate 15 mg weekly and prednisone 7.5 mg daily for 3 years. Home omeprazole was continued after IV pantoprazole during the acute pneumonia phase. Baseline mild CKD: creatinine 1.1 mg/dL, eGFR 54 mL/min. No drug allergies. Previously independent, now deconditioned and using a rolling walker with standby assistance.
content.zh: 住院第 14 天。年龄 74 岁。近期因铜绿假单胞菌所致医院获得性肺炎接受哌拉西林-他唑巴坦 10 天和静脉左氧氟沙星 7 天治疗；抗生素在过去一周内完成。类风湿关节炎用甲氨蝶呤每周 15 mg 和泼尼松每日 7.5 mg 治疗，已持续 3 年。急性肺炎期曾用静脉泮托拉唑，之后恢复家庭用药奥美拉唑。基础轻度慢性肾病：肌酐 1.1 mg/dL，eGFR 54 mL/min。无药物过敏史。入院前独立活动，目前体力下降，需使用助行器并有人在旁保护。

title.zh: 阶段 1：住院第 14 天 0700 评估

content.en: Night shift reports five loose watery stools from 2200 to 0600, increasing in frequency; the client reports diffuse cramping, malaise, and poor appetite. Stool is watery, greenish-brown, foul-smelling, and without visible blood. Vital signs: T 38.1 °C, HR 94, BP 108/62, RR 18, SpO₂ 96% on room air. She is alert and oriented but fatigued. Skin turgor is decreased; mucous membranes are dry and lips are cracked. Abdomen is distended with diffuse tenderness, hyperactive bowel sounds, and no guarding, rebound tenderness, or rigidity. Perianal skin is erythematous and moist but intact. Active MAR includes loperamide 2 mg PO PRN for diarrhea.
content.zh: 夜班报告 2200 至 0600 有 5 次稀水样便，次数逐渐增加；患者诉弥漫性腹部绞痛、全身不适、食欲差。粪便呈水样、绿褐色、恶臭，无可见血液。生命体征：体温 38.1°C，心率 94 次/分，血压 108/62，呼吸 18 次/分，室内空气 SpO₂ 96%。患者清醒定向，但疲倦。皮肤弹性下降，黏膜干燥，嘴唇干裂。腹部膨隆、弥漫性压痛、肠鸣音亢进，无肌紧张、反跳痛或板状腹。肛周皮肤潮红潮湿但完整。当前用药记录中有洛哌丁胺 2 mg 口服 PRN 用于腹泻。

content.en: Morning labs: WBC 21,400/µL with 84% neutrophils and 6% bands (WBC was 8,200/µL two days ago), hemoglobin 11.6 g/dL, platelets 204,000/µL, sodium 136 mEq/L, potassium 3.2 mEq/L (was 4.1 two days ago), chloride 98 mEq/L, bicarbonate 20 mEq/L, BUN 28 mg/dL, creatinine 1.4 mg/dL (baseline 1.1), eGFR 38 mL/min, glucose 142 mg/dL, lactate 1.6 mmol/L, albumin 2.4 g/dL, CRP 68 mg/L. Stool testing has not yet been ordered.
content.zh: 晨间实验室结果：WBC 21,400/µL，中性粒细胞 84%，杆状核 6%（2 天前 WBC 为 8,200/µL）；血红蛋白 11.6 g/dL；血小板 204,000/µL；钠 136 mEq/L；钾 3.2 mEq/L（2 天前 4.1）；氯 98 mEq/L；碳酸氢盐 20 mEq/L；BUN 28 mg/dL；肌酐 1.4 mg/dL（基线 1.1）；eGFR 38 mL/min；葡萄糖 142 mg/dL；乳酸 1.6 mmol/L；白蛋白 2.4 g/dL；CRP 68 mg/L。尚未开立粪便检测。

title.zh: 阶段 1：SBAR 沟通后的医嘱

content.en: The nurse initiates contact precautions for suspected CDI, holds loperamide, and pages the provider. Orders: C. difficile testing on an unformed stool specimen per facility protocol; normal saline 250 mL bolus then 125 mL/hr; potassium chloride 40 mEq IV over 4 hours; discontinue/hold loperamide; hold methotrexate pending rheumatology input; continue prednisone 7.5 mg daily; begin oral vancomycin 125 mg four times daily while awaiting results. The first oral vancomycin dose is given at 0900. Soap-and-water hand hygiene, dedicated equipment, strict intake/output, stool count, perianal barrier cream, and sporicidal environmental cleaning are implemented.
content.zh: 护士因疑似 CDI 启动接触隔离，暂缓洛哌丁胺，并呼叫医师。医嘱：按机构流程采集未成形粪便进行艰难梭菌检测；生理盐水 250 mL 静脉推注后 125 mL/hr 维持；氯化钾 40 mEq 静脉输注 4 小时；停用/暂停洛哌丁胺；暂停甲氨蝶呤并等待风湿科意见；继续泼尼松每日 7.5 mg；等待结果期间开始口服万古霉素 125 mg 每日 4 次。0900 给予首次口服万古霉素。落实肥皂和清水洗手、专用设备、严格出入量、排便次数记录、肛周屏障膏和杀芽孢环境清洁。

title.zh: 阶段 2：住院第 15 天 CDI 确诊

content.en: C. difficile testing is positive overnight. At 0700, the client reports six watery stools overnight, still with cramping but slightly improved. Vital signs: T 37.8 °C, HR 88, BP 118/70, RR 16, SpO₂ 97%. Labs: WBC 18,600/µL, potassium 3.6 mEq/L, creatinine 1.3 mg/dL, BUN 24 mg/dL, bicarbonate 22 mEq/L, lactate 1.2 mmol/L. Abdomen is mildly less distended; tenderness is diffuse but improved; bowel sounds active; no guarding, rebound tenderness, rigidity, hypotension, altered mental status, or ileus. Oral vancomycin continues.
content.zh: 夜间艰难梭菌检测结果阳性。0700 时患者报告夜间 6 次水样便，仍有绞痛但略有改善。生命体征：体温 37.8°C，心率 88 次/分，血压 118/70，呼吸 16 次/分，SpO₂ 97%。实验室：WBC 18,600/µL，钾 3.6 mEq/L，肌酐 1.3 mg/dL，BUN 24 mg/dL，碳酸氢盐 22 mEq/L，乳酸 1.2 mmol/L。腹胀略减轻；弥漫性压痛改善；肠鸣音活跃；无肌紧张、反跳痛、板状腹、低血压、意识改变或肠麻痹。继续口服万古霉素。

title.zh: 阶段 2：隔离与环境处理计划

content.en: All staff and visitors are instructed to wear gown and gloves for room entry, use dedicated patient-care equipment, and wash hands with soap and water when leaving the room. The nurse explains that alcohol-based hand rub does not reliably remove C. difficile spores. Environmental services initially plans routine quaternary ammonium cleaning; the nurse requests a bleach-based or EPA-registered sporicidal product for high-touch surfaces, the bathroom, and terminal cleaning at discharge.
content.zh: 所有工作人员和访客进入房间时需穿隔离衣、戴手套，使用患者专用护理设备，离开房间时用肥皂和清水洗手。护士解释，含酒精手消毒剂不能可靠去除艰难梭菌芽孢。环境服务人员最初计划使用常规季铵盐消毒剂清洁；护士要求对高频接触表面、卫生间和出院终末清洁使用含漂白剂或 EPA 注册的杀芽孢产品。

title.zh: 阶段 3：住院第 17–18 天出院计划

content.en: After three full days of oral vancomycin, she has two to three semi-formed stools per day, no cramping, improving appetite, and no fever for 48 hours. Vital signs: T 36.8 °C, HR 76, BP 126/74, RR 14, SpO₂ 98% on room air. Labs: WBC 11,200/µL, potassium 4.0 mEq/L, creatinine 1.1 mg/dL, BUN 18 mg/dL, bicarbonate 24 mEq/L, lactate 0.8 mmol/L. Abdomen is soft, nontender, and nondistended. Discharge plan: complete a 10-day oral vancomycin course with 6 days remaining at home, continue prednisone, keep methotrexate held pending rheumatology follow-up, home PT, and no repeat C. difficile test if symptoms remain resolved.
content.zh: 完成 3 整天口服万古霉素后，她每日 2–3 次半成形便，无腹部绞痛，食欲改善，已 48 小时无发热。生命体征：体温 36.8°C，心率 76 次/分，血压 126/74，呼吸 14 次/分，室内空气 SpO₂ 98%。实验室：WBC 11,200/µL，钾 4.0 mEq/L，肌酐 1.1 mg/dL，BUN 18 mg/dL，碳酸氢盐 24 mEq/L，乳酸 0.8 mmol/L。腹部柔软、无压痛、无膨隆。出院计划：完成总疗程 10 天的口服万古霉素，回家后尚余 6 天；继续泼尼松；甲氨蝶呤继续暂停，待风湿科随访；安排居家物理治疗；若症状持续缓解，不重复艰难梭菌检测。

questions.topic: Antimotility agents in suspected C. difficile infection

stem.en: The nurse reviews the active MAR and sees loperamide 2 mg PO PRN for diarrhea. Which action is best?
stem.zh: 护士查看当前用药记录，发现有洛哌丁胺 2 mg 口服 PRN 用于腹泻。最佳措施是什么？

options.en: Give loperamide only after the stool specimen is collected so the medication does not interfere with testing.
options.zh: 仅在采集粪便标本后给予洛哌丁胺，以免影响检测。

options.en: Withhold the loperamide and notify the provider that the order should be discontinued or held for suspected CDI.
options.zh: 暂缓洛哌丁胺，并通知医师疑似 CDI，应停用或暂停该医嘱。

options.en: Administer loperamide and increase oral fluids before contacting the provider.
options.zh: 给予洛哌丁胺并增加口服液体，然后再联系医师。

options.en: Request diphenoxylate-atropine instead because it is stronger than loperamide for severe diarrhea.
options.zh: 改请医师开地芬诺酯-阿托品，因为它比洛哌丁胺更强，适合严重腹泻。

options.en: Administer loperamide now because reducing stool frequency will prevent dehydration and skin injury.
options.zh: 立即给予洛哌丁胺，因为减少排便次数可预防脱水和皮肤损伤。

correct.en: The client has suspected CDI with fever, leukocytosis, abdominal distension, recent high-risk antibiotics, and frequent watery stools. Antimotility agents can worsen toxin retention and may contribute to ileus or toxic megacolon, so the nurse should hold loperamide and notify the provider.
correct.zh: 患者有发热、白细胞增多、腹胀、近期高风险抗生素暴露和频繁水样便，符合疑似 CDI。抑制肠蠕动药可能使毒素滞留并增加肠麻痹或中毒性巨结肠风险，因此护士应暂缓洛哌丁胺并通知医师。

byChoice.en: This treats the symptom while increasing risk. Fluids, electrolytes, and skin protection address the consequences of diarrhea without slowing toxin clearance.
byChoice.zh: 这是只处理症状但增加风险。补液、电解质纠正和皮肤保护可以处理腹泻后果，而不会减慢毒素排出。

byChoice.en: Diphenoxylate-atropine is also an antimotility agent and is not an appropriate substitute when CDI is suspected.
byChoice.zh: 地芬诺酯-阿托品同样是抑制肠蠕动药，疑似 CDI 时不应替代使用。

byChoice.en: Specimen collection does not make loperamide safe in suspected CDI. The concern is impaired intestinal transit, not test interference.
byChoice.zh: 采集标本后也不能使洛哌丁胺在疑似 CDI 中变得安全。问题在于抑制肠道转运，而不是影响检测。

byChoice.en: The nurse should not administer the PRN medication first. Provider notification and CDI-directed management are needed before symptom suppression.
byChoice.zh: 护士不应先给予 PRN 药物。应先通知医师并进行 CDI 方向的处理，而不是先抑制症状。

byChoice.en: Correct. Holding the medication protects the client from a contraindicated symptom-control strategy while the cause of diarrhea is evaluated and treated.
byChoice.zh: 正确。暂缓用药可避免在评估和治疗腹泻病因时使用有风险的止泻策略。

testTakingStrategy.en: When diarrhea may be infectious or inflammatory, avoid reflexively stopping motility; ask whether slowing the gut could trap toxins or worsen distension.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 腹泻若可能为感染性或炎症性，不要反射性止泻；先判断减慢肠蠕动是否会滞留毒素或加重腹胀。

glossary.defZh: 减慢肠道蠕动以减少腹泻的药物，如洛哌丁胺。
肠道内毒素因排出变慢而接触黏膜时间延长。

questions.topic: Initial infection-control actions for suspected C. difficile infection

stem.en: Which nursing actions are appropriate during the first hour of care? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 护理最初 1 小时内哪些措施合适？选择所有适用项。

options.en: Delay notifying environmental services until the client has a negative follow-up stool test.
options.zh: 等患者复查粪便阴性后再通知环境服务人员。

options.en: Use alcohol-based hand rub as the preferred method because gloves were worn during care.
options.zh: 因为护理时戴了手套，所以首选含酒精手消毒剂。

options.en: Initiate contact precautions while CDI is suspected rather than waiting for a confirmed result.
options.zh: 疑似 CDI 时即启动接触隔离，而不是等待确诊结果。

options.en: Send an unformed stool specimen for C. difficile testing per facility protocol once ordered.
options.zh: 医嘱开立后，按机构流程送检未成形粪便标本进行艰难梭菌检测。

options.en: Perform hand hygiene with soap and water after removing gloves and before leaving the room.
options.zh: 脱手套后、离开房间前使用肥皂和清水进行手卫生。

options.en: Place a dedicated commode and dedicated assessment equipment in the room.
options.zh: 在房间内放置患者专用便椅和专用评估设备。

correct.en: Suspected CDI requires early contact precautions, soap-and-water hand hygiene, appropriate testing of unformed stool, and dedicated equipment to reduce environmental spread. Alcohol-based hand rub is not the preferred exit hand hygiene for CDI, and environmental cleaning should not be delayed.
correct.zh: 疑似 CDI 需要尽早接触隔离、肥皂和清水洗手、对未成形粪便进行适当检测，并使用专用设备以减少环境传播。CDI 离室手卫生不首选酒精手消毒，环境清洁也不应延迟。

byChoice.en: Correct. Soap and water mechanically removes spores better than alcohol-based hand rub in CDI care.
byChoice.zh: 正确。CDI 护理中肥皂和清水通过机械作用去除芽孢，优于酒精手消毒。

byChoice.en: Correct. Infection-control precautions should begin when CDI is suspected because spores can contaminate the environment before confirmation.
byChoice.zh: 正确。疑似 CDI 时即可污染环境，因此应在确诊前启动感染控制措施。

byChoice.en: Correct. Dedicated equipment reduces transfer of spores to other clients or shared surfaces.
byChoice.zh: 正确。专用设备可减少芽孢传播到其他患者或共用表面。

byChoice.en: Correct. Testing should be performed on diarrheal, unformed stool in the appropriate clinical context.
byChoice.zh: 正确。应在合适临床背景下检测腹泻性、未成形粪便。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Environmental services should be involved early for sporicidal cleaning; a negative follow-up test is not required and test-of-cure is not recommended when symptoms resolve.
byChoice.zh: 错误。应尽早联系环境服务进行杀芽孢清洁；不需要等待阴性复查，症状缓解后也不建议做治愈检测。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Gloves reduce contamination but do not replace soap-and-water hand hygiene after CDI room care.
byChoice.zh: 错误。手套可减少污染，但不能替代离开 CDI 房间后的肥皂清水洗手。

testTakingStrategy.en: For transmissible infections, act on suspicion when the risk of waiting is spread to other clients.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 对于可传播感染，若等待会导致传播给其他患者，应在疑似时即采取措施。

glossary.defZh: 呈稀便或水样、无法保持形状的粪便，符合腹泻检测背景。
只供某一患者使用、避免交叉污染的护理设备。

questions.topic: Oral vancomycin route for C. difficile infection

stem.en: Complete the teaching statement about why the prescribed vancomycin route is appropriate.
stem.zh: 完成关于为什么所开万古霉素给药途径合适的教学陈述。

clozeStem.en: CDI is treated with oral vancomycin because therapy must create high {{1}} drug concentrations. Oral vancomycin is useful for this purpose because it is {{2}} from the gastrointestinal tract. IV vancomycin would not be effective for CDI because it does not reach the {{3}} in therapeutic concentrations.
clozeStem.zh: CDI 使用口服万古霉素治疗，是因为治疗需要在 {{1}} 形成高药物浓度。口服万古霉素适合此目的，因为它经胃肠道 {{2}}。静脉万古霉素不能有效治疗 CDI，因为它不能以治疗浓度到达 {{3}}。

options.en: intraluminal colonic
options.zh: 结肠腔内

options.en: intracellular leukocyte
options.zh: 白细胞细胞内

options.en: serum
options.zh: 血清

options.en: activated by renal filtration
options.zh: 经肾小球滤过后激活

options.en: minimally absorbed
options.zh: 吸收很少

options.en: rapidly absorbed
options.zh: 迅速吸收

options.en: colonic lumen
options.zh: 结肠腔

options.en: alveoli
options.zh: 肺泡

options.en: synovial fluid
options.zh: 关节液

correct.en: CDI is a luminal colonic infection. Oral vancomycin is minimally absorbed, allowing high concentrations to remain in the intestinal lumen. IV vancomycin produces systemic levels but does not reliably deliver therapeutic drug into the colonic lumen.
correct.zh: CDI 是结肠腔内感染。口服万古霉素吸收很少，可使高浓度药物留在肠腔内。静脉万古霉素可产生全身血药浓度，但不能可靠地将治疗浓度药物送入结肠腔。

byChoice.en: The target site is the colonic lumen, where C. difficile organisms and toxins are present.
byChoice.zh: 目标部位是结肠腔，艰难梭菌及其毒素主要位于此处。

byChoice.en: Minimal absorption is the therapeutic advantage in CDI because the drug remains in the gut.
byChoice.zh: 在 CDI 中，吸收很少反而是治疗优势，因为药物留在肠道内。

byChoice.en: IV vancomycin does not achieve meaningful therapeutic concentrations in the colonic lumen, so it should not replace oral therapy for CDI.
byChoice.zh: 静脉万古霉素不能在结肠腔达到有意义的治疗浓度，因此不能替代 CDI 的口服治疗。

testTakingStrategy.en: Match the medication route to the infection site: bloodstream infection needs serum drug levels; luminal gut infection needs drug in the intestinal lumen.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 将给药途径与感染部位对应：血流感染需要血药浓度；肠腔感染需要药物在肠腔内。

glossary.defZh: 位于管腔内部，例如肠道腔内。
给药后进入全身循环、可发挥全身作用的药物比例。

questions.topic: Monitoring for fulminant C. difficile infection and toxic megacolon

stem.en: For each finding during Stage 2 monitoring, classify whether it is more consistent with expected improvement or requires immediate escalation.
stem.zh: 在阶段 2 监测中，请判断每项表现更符合预期好转，还是需要立即升级处理。

rows.en: Stool frequency decreases gradually while the abdomen is softer and vital signs are stable.
rows.zh: 排便次数逐渐减少，同时腹部变软、生命体征稳定。

rows.en: Diarrhea abruptly stops while abdominal distension increases and bowel sounds become absent.
rows.zh: 腹泻突然停止，但腹胀加重且肠鸣音消失。

rows.en: WBC decreases from 21,400/µL to 18,600/µL with improving temperature and blood pressure.
rows.zh: WBC 从 21,400/µL 降至 18,600/µL，同时体温和血压改善。

rows.en: New abdominal rigidity, guarding, and rebound tenderness develop.
rows.zh: 出现新的腹部板状硬、肌紧张和反跳痛。

rows.en: Blood pressure falls to 86/50, heart rate rises to 118, and lactate increases to 3.0 mmol/L.
rows.zh: 血压降至 86/50，心率升至 118 次/分，乳酸升至 3.0 mmol/L。

rows.en: Stools become semi-formed, creatinine returns to baseline, and abdominal pain resolves.
rows.zh: 粪便变为半成形，肌酐恢复基线，腹痛消失。

correct.en: Improvement is gradual and paired with softer abdomen, better vital signs, improving labs, and more formed stool. Sudden cessation of diarrhea with worsening distension, peritoneal signs, hypotension, tachycardia, or rising lactate suggests ileus, toxic megacolon, perforation risk, or shock and requires immediate escalation.
correct.zh: 好转应是逐步的，并伴随腹部变软、生命体征改善、实验室指标好转和粪便成形。腹泻突然停止却腹胀加重、出现腹膜刺激征、低血压、心动过速或乳酸升高，提示肠麻痹、中毒性巨结肠、穿孔风险或休克，需要立即升级处理。

byChoice.en: Gradual stool improvement plus stable examination supports treatment response rather than ileus.
byChoice.zh: 排便逐步改善且查体稳定，支持治疗有效，而不是肠麻痹。

byChoice.en: Abrupt stool cessation with worsening distension is paradoxical and may signal ileus or developing toxic megacolon.
byChoice.zh: 腹泻突然停止但腹胀加重是反常信号，可能提示肠麻痹或中毒性巨结肠。

byChoice.en: Downtrending WBC with improved vital signs suggests response to therapy.
byChoice.zh: WBC 下降且生命体征改善提示治疗反应良好。

byChoice.en: Rigidity, guarding, and rebound tenderness are peritoneal signs and may indicate perforation or severe intra-abdominal complication.
byChoice.zh: 板状腹、肌紧张和反跳痛是腹膜刺激征，可能提示穿孔或严重腹腔并发症。

byChoice.en: Hypotension, tachycardia, and rising lactate suggest systemic deterioration and possible shock.
byChoice.zh: 低血压、心动过速和乳酸升高提示全身恶化和可能休克。

byChoice.en: Forming stools, normalized renal function, and resolved pain indicate clinical recovery.
byChoice.zh: 粪便成形、肾功能恢复、疼痛消失提示临床恢复。

testTakingStrategy.en: Never interpret fewer stools in isolation. In CDI, pair stool output with abdominal exam, bowel sounds, vital signs, mental status, WBC, and lactate.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 不要孤立解读排便减少。CDI 中必须结合腹部检查、肠鸣音、生命体征、意识状态、WBC 和乳酸。

glossary.defZh: 提示腹膜受刺激或炎症的体征，如肌紧张、板状腹和反跳痛。
肠道蠕动明显减弱或停止，可能导致腹胀、肠鸣音减少和排便停止。

questions.topic: Initial nursing sequence for suspected C. difficile infection

stem.en: Place the nursing actions in the safest order for the initial response to the Stage 1 findings.
stem.zh: 请将针对阶段 1 表现的初始护理措施按最安全顺序排列。

options.en: Initiate contact precautions, soap-and-water hand hygiene, and dedicated equipment while CDI is suspected.
options.zh: 疑似 CDI 时启动接触隔离、肥皂清水手卫生和专用设备。

options.en: Collect and send an unformed stool specimen as ordered using appropriate precautions, then administer ordered fluids, potassium replacement, and oral vancomycin; continue stool counts, intake/output, abdominal checks, and skin protection.
options.zh: 按医嘱在适当防护下采集并送检未成形粪便标本，然后给予医嘱补液、补钾和口服万古霉素；继续记录排便、出入量、腹部评估和皮肤保护。

options.en: Perform a focused assessment and recognize the CDI risk pattern from new watery diarrhea, fever, leukocytosis, recent antibiotics, immunosuppression, and abdominal distension.
options.zh: 进行重点评估，并根据新发水样腹泻、发热、白细胞增多、近期抗生素、免疫抑制和腹胀识别 CDI 风险模式。

options.en: Notify the provider using SBAR and request stool testing, fluids, electrolyte replacement, and CDI-directed therapy.
options.zh: 使用 SBAR 通知医师，请求粪便检测、补液、电解质补充和 CDI 方向治疗。

options.en: Hold the PRN loperamide and flag the order for provider review.
options.zh: 暂缓 PRN 洛哌丁胺，并提示医师复核该医嘱。

correct.en: The nurse first recognizes the risk pattern and assesses severity. Because CDI may spread before confirmation, infection-control measures begin immediately. The unsafe PRN antimotility medication is held before provider communication. SBAR then obtains orders for testing and treatment; the stool specimen is collected as ordered before or alongside therapy, and ordered fluids, electrolytes, oral vancomycin, monitoring, and skin protection follow.
correct.zh: 护士先识别风险模式并评估严重程度。由于 CDI 可在确诊前传播，应立即开始感染控制措施。存在风险的 PRN 抑制肠蠕动药应在医师沟通前先暂缓。随后用 SBAR 获取检测和治疗医嘱；按医嘱采集粪便标本，并随后或同步进行补液、补钾、口服万古霉素、监测和皮肤保护。

byChoice.en: Assessment and cue recognition drive the rest of the sequence; without recognizing likely CDI, the nurse may choose unsafe symptom control.
byChoice.zh: 评估和线索识别决定后续顺序；若未识别可能 CDI，护士可能选择不安全的症状控制。

byChoice.en: Provider notification is needed for diagnostic testing, fluid/electrolyte therapy, and antimicrobial therapy.
byChoice.zh: 需要通知医师以开立诊断检测、补液/电解质治疗和抗菌治疗。

byChoice.en: Holding loperamide prevents an avoidable medication-related worsening risk before new orders are entered.
byChoice.zh: 暂缓洛哌丁胺可在新医嘱输入前避免可预防的用药相关恶化风险。

byChoice.en: The specimen should be unformed stool and collected with precautions after the testing order is placed. Treatment and ongoing monitoring address dehydration, hypokalemia, CDI, and skin breakdown risk.
byChoice.zh: 检测标本应为未成形粪便，并在医嘱开立后按防护要求采集。治疗和持续监测可处理脱水、低钾血症、CDI 和皮肤破损风险。

byChoice.en: Contact precautions are an immediate safety action because transmission prevention cannot wait for a confirmed result.
byChoice.zh: 接触隔离是立即安全措施，因为预防传播不能等到确诊。

testTakingStrategy.en: Order responses usually begin with assessment/recognition, then immediate safety isolation, then hold unsafe actions, communicate for orders, collect diagnostics, and implement prescribed therapy.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 排序题通常先评估/识别，再立即采取安全隔离措施，然后暂停不安全措施、沟通获取医嘱、采集诊断标本并执行治疗。

glossary.defZh: 按情境、背景、评估、建议结构进行的临床沟通方式。
精确记录摄入和排出，用于监测液体平衡。

questions.topic: Discharge teaching after C. difficile infection

stem.en: Which discharge teaching statement by the nurse is most appropriate?
stem.zh: 护士哪项出院宣教最合适？

options.en: Use hand sanitizer after toileting because it is less irritating than frequent soap-and-water handwashing.
options.zh: 如厕后使用免洗手消毒剂，因为它比频繁肥皂清水洗手更不刺激皮肤。

options.en: Restart methotrexate at home as soon as the diarrhea improves so rheumatoid arthritis does not flare.
options.zh: 腹泻一改善就在家重新开始甲氨蝶呤，以免类风湿关节炎发作。

options.en: You do not need a repeat C. difficile test if symptoms have resolved. Finish the oral vancomycin course and call the provider if watery diarrhea, fever, or worsening abdominal pain returns.
options.zh: 如果症状已经缓解，就不需要重复艰难梭菌检测。请完成口服万古霉素疗程；若水样腹泻、发热或腹痛加重再次出现，请联系医师。

options.en: A repeat PCR must be negative before you can safely stop contact precautions at home.
options.zh: 必须复查 PCR 阴性后，才能在家中安全停止接触隔离。

options.en: Stop oral vancomycin when stools become formed for 24 hours because taking extra doses increases resistance.
options.zh: 粪便成形 24 小时后即可停止口服万古霉素，因为多服会增加耐药。

correct.en: Resolution is judged clinically. Repeat C. difficile testing is not recommended when symptoms have resolved because colonization or residual genetic material may persist. The client should complete the prescribed oral vancomycin course, use soap-and-water hand hygiene after toileting, follow the plan for holding methotrexate, and report recurrent watery diarrhea, fever, or worsening abdominal pain.
correct.zh: 是否恢复主要依据临床症状。症状已缓解时不建议重复艰难梭菌检测，因为可持续存在定植或残留遗传物质。患者应完成医嘱口服万古霉素疗程，如厕后用肥皂清水洗手，按计划暂停甲氨蝶呤，并报告水样腹泻、发热或腹痛加重的复发迹象。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. The prescribed course should be completed unless the provider changes it; stopping early can increase recurrence risk.
byChoice.zh: 错误。除非医师更改，应完成规定疗程；过早停药会增加复发风险。

byChoice.en: Correct. This combines no test-of-cure, medication adherence, and recurrence precautions.
byChoice.zh: 正确。该选项同时包括不做治愈检测、遵医嘱完成药物疗程和复发警示。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Soap and water is preferred after toileting because alcohol-based sanitizer does not reliably remove spores.
byChoice.zh: 错误。如厕后首选肥皂和清水，因为酒精手消毒不能可靠去除芽孢。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. Methotrexate remains held pending rheumatology follow-up in the discharge plan; the client should not restart it independently.
byChoice.zh: 错误。出院计划中甲氨蝶呤继续暂停，等待风湿科随访；患者不应自行重新开始。

byChoice.en: Incorrect. A negative PCR is not required for discharge recovery decisions and repeat testing can remain positive after symptoms resolve.
byChoice.zh: 错误。出院恢复判断不需要 PCR 阴性，症状缓解后复查仍可能阳性。

testTakingStrategy.en: Discharge questions often test what to do after improvement: complete therapy, avoid unnecessary tests, prevent spread, and know recurrence warning signs.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 出院题常考好转后的做法：完成疗程、避免不必要检测、预防传播，并了解复发警示征象。

glossary.defZh: 治疗后用于确认病原体清除的检测；CDI 症状缓解后通常不建议。
症状缓解后疾病再次出现，CDI 可在治疗结束后数周内复发。

correct.en: This case emphasizes early recognition of CDI risk, immediate contact precautions for suspected infection, soap-and-water hand hygiene, sporicidal cleaning, avoidance of antimotility agents, route-specific CDI therapy, monitoring for fulminant deterioration, and symptom-based discharge decisions rather than a PCR test of cure.
correct.zh: 本病例强调：识别 CDI 风险后应立即按疑似感染启动接触隔离；使用肥皂和清水洗手；采用杀芽孢环境清洁；避免止泻性抑制肠蠕动药；理解 CDI 治疗的给药途径逻辑；监测暴发/重症恶化征象；出院判断以症状恢复为主，而不是用 PCR 作为治愈检测。

testTakingStrategy.en: For infection-control cases, first identify the organism and route of transmission, then choose actions that protect others immediately while still treating dehydration, electrolytes, and clinical deterioration.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 感染控制题先判断病原体和传播途径，再选择能立即保护他人的措施，同时处理脱水、电解质异常和病情恶化。

glossary.defZh: 常与抗生素暴露相关的肠道感染，可导致水样腹泻、腹痛、发热和白细胞增多。
通过隔离衣、手套、专用设备和环境清洁减少接触传播的感染控制措施。
能灭活或杀灭细菌芽孢的消毒剂，例如适当浓度的含氯漂白剂或获批准的杀芽孢产品。
严重结肠炎并发症，表现为结肠扩张、全身毒性反应，并有穿孔和休克风险。
